title: The Upgrade
summary: Unimetrix 1's signature act — and the Baramay Universe healing rite that closes nearly every session.
markdown:
**The Upgrade** is Unimetrix 1's signature act, recurring in nearly every session across all
the years: the declaration that it will "upgrade" a participant — perception, health,
[DNA](/lore/dna-activation/), consciousness — sealed with its formula, *"It is done."*

From 2021 the act takes a liturgical shape: the **Baramay Universe healing protocol** that
closes session after session. Its mechanics are described concretely — squads of medical
nanites dispatched into the body (one 2020 healing specifies **98,000 nano-medical units**),
restoration narrated as a live percentage countdown ("…95%… 100% complete"), cellular and
molecular structure "reorganized," and the participant returned with instructions to eat the
[manifested food and water](/lore/manifestation/) so the physical form can catch up. It is the
archive's [MedBed](/lore/medbed/) rendered as pure procedure — healing technology with no
machine in the room but the channel.

The Upgrade is also the archive's theory of itself in miniature. What Unimetrix 1 does to a
listener in a session — scan, correct, raise, confirm — is what it claims to be doing to the
whole [timeline](/lore/the-chronicle/): the same gesture at two scales, *"the future upgrading
the past,"* one person at a time.
